calendar.matters:
Prove-Up Hearing Before Judge Kahn Per Order Filed On 8/4/20
Off Calendar Aug-28-2020 Text Ruling

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-04-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Aug-04-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. Katy M. Young, Esq. of AD ASTRA LAW GROUP, LLP (Tel: 415-795-3579) appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff Nathan Desomber;
Atty. Martin A. Poggio, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF VERNON C. GOINS (Tel: 510-663-3700) appearing via Zoom for Defendant/Cross-Complaint Sean Killen.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF NATHAN DESOMBER'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION.

The matter is called. The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

9:01 a.m. : Witness BRITTANY NELSON, called by the plaintiff, is sworn and testifies under direct examination by plaintiff's counsel.

9:05 a.m. : The witness testifies under cross examination by defense counsel.

9:07 a.m. : The witness testifies under examination by the court.

9:14 a.m. : The witness testifies under further direct examination

9:15 a.m. : The witness testifies under further cross examination. The witness testifies under further direct examination.

9:16 a.m. : The witness is excused.

Argument is presented to the Court by counsel for both sides.

The matter is submitted by the parties.

The Court takes Plaintiff Nathan Desomber's Motion For Reconsideration under submission.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar May-29-2020 Continued To Jun-16-20 At 09:31 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Sean Killen To Vacate Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-14-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Katy Young, Esq. 415-795-3579 of Ad Astra for Plaintiff Nathan Desomber who is also present.
Vernon Goins, Esq. 510-663-3700 for Defendant Sean Killen who is also present.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court shares its views. Plaintiff argues, cites "Ellard" case. Defendant responds. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SEAN KILLEN's Motion To Vacate Default Judgment.

Taken Under Submission. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Sean Killen To Vacate Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-06-2019 Continued To Jan-31-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vernon Goins, Esq. and Martin A. Poggio, Esq. of the LAW OFFICES OF VERNON GOINS, T:510.663.3700, for defendant/moving party;
Katy M. Young, Esq. of AD ASTRA LAW GROUP, LLP, T:415.521.1912, for plaintiff/opposing party.

RULING: Plaintiff's counsel contested the tentative ruling. The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, and the Court finding good cause,

DEFENDANT SEAN KILLEN's Motion To Vacate Default Judgment is continued to January 31, 2020 at 9:00am in Department 302. Plaintiff shall file a supplemental opposition by 1/10/20; defendant's reply due by 1/24/20. The Court will not consider any issue that is not on the papers.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
